title: MISTAKE: User said thumbs up as a shallow acknowledgment. Bad assistant behavior: treated thumbs up as a new task and gave...
content:
What went wrong: User said thumbs up as a shallow acknowledgment. Bad assistant behavior: treated thumbs up as a new task and gave repetitive shortcut instructions instead of just acknowledging briefly or continuing prior work. Correct behavior: respond minimally, avoid re-explaining, and continue only if there is active work.
How to avoid: avoid: User said thumbs up as a shallow acknowledgment.
